title: [lora_l2.c:291-326] lichen_lora_l2_init does not clear rx_callback_user_data
description:
Gap found: init() state clearing incomplete.

Why this was missed: Round 1 noted callback not cleared but not user_data.

The actual bug: In lichen_lora_l2_init() (lines 287-327):
- Line 304: atomic_set(&lora_state.running, 0)
- Line 305: atomic_set(&lora_state.aborted, 0)
- Line 306: rx_callback = NULL

Missing: rx_callback_user_data is not cleared. If init() is called after stop() without deinit(), stale user_data could be paired with new callback.

Actually, reviewing the sequence:
1. stop() clears both callback and user_data (lines 434-435)
2. deinit() clears both (lines 590-591)
3. init() only clears callback (line 306)

This is inconsistent. init() should clear user_data too for symmetry:
  lora_state.rx_callback_user_data = NULL;

Priority 3 - stale pointer could cause issues if callback set without user_data.
close_reason: Already fixed: rx_callback_user_data is cleared to NULL at line 401 in lichen_lora_l2_init()
